#### Have a question?

Your Name

E-Mail Address

Message

[#gyeonize
](https://youtu.be/f0uvKtao4zI?si=rT2cSCPX6_NHct45)

## show car gloss with darkening effect
Q² WAX is an extremely glossy wax for any color with outstanding hydrophobic properties. What makes it stand out is its extremely easy application and wipe-off, making it a real pleasure to use.
Enhances darker paint, rendering it deep and wet, while enriching lighter paint with increased reflectivity and depth ('depth' is hard to obtain on white vehicles, give Q² Wax a go to see how it enhances white paint).
It can be applied over PPF, glossy plastics, and will not leave white marks on trim.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-wax-1.jpg?v=1702326442&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-wax.jpg?v=1702326442&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/applying-gyeon-wax.jpg?v=1702326442&width=2400)

Based on ceramic coatings
GYEON leveraged their know-how and expertise in coating formulations to create an unconventional wax. Q² Wax incorporates fluorine into its formula, akin to the legendary Q² Booster, a highly reactive topcoat, ensuring exceptional performance, immense beading, and brilliant gloss. It serves as a perfect stand-alone product for DIY users and enthusiasts, yet also surprises detailing professionals as an entry-level protection product and an excellent top-up to GYEON's ceramic coatings.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-quickdetailer.jpg?v=1702332115&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-qm-quick-detailer-400ml)

## Maintain with this
Use GYEON Quick Detailer to maintain your Q2 Wax. It can be used to remove light contaminants like bird droppings.

[
Shop GYEON Quick Detailer
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-qm-quick-detailer-400ml)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-clay.jpg?v=1702332115&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q-clay-mild-100g)

## Quick Clay
Clay not only decontaminates but also promotes product adhesion.

[
Shop GYEON Clay
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q-clay-mild-100g)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-tire.jpg?v=1702332115&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/q2-tire-sio2-coating-400ml)

## Don't forget the tires
Dress the tires for a complete show car look. GYEON Tire provides a nice satin finish.

[
Shop GYEON Tire
](https://carzilla.ca/products/q2-tire-sio2-coating-400ml)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-wax-glossy-results_1.jpg?v=1702326442&width=2400)

Layer for even more gloss
Preparation is key! Ensure thorough washing and degreasing of the surface for maximum performance. Apply a moderate and uniform layer over dry paintwork. Allow it to cure for a minimum of 30 minutes before wipe-off. We recommend using Q²M PolishWipe for this task.

**Tip:** Apply a thin layer for ease of removal; do not overapply. It's always best to apply multiple thin layers than one thick one. It can also be applied with a polisher.

**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

# 

# GYEON Wax 175g

### The perfect wax that specifically designed to go on your coated and non coated car, to give it the lustre exclusively to waxes.

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__05_Leaflet_ExteriorSurfaceProtection_2022_WEB.pdf?v=1666391000)

Q² Wax – the most traditional type of car care product meets sophisticated technology and innovative packaging.

CAPACITIES: 175GR
BOX CONTAINS: Q² WAX / MICROFIBER TOWEL / WAX APPLICATOR

### FLUORINE BASED

We took our know how and expertise in coating formulations and used to create an unconventional wax. Q² Wax includes fluorine in its formula. As in the legendary Q² Booster, a highly reactive topcoat, it is the guarantee of great performance, enormous beading and great gloss. It is a perfect stand alone product, dedicated to DIY users and enthusiasts, but will also surprise detailing professionals as an entry level protection product, as well as a great top up to one of our ceramic coatings.

### RESISTANT & EASY TO USE

Q² WAX is an extremely glossy wax for any colour with outstanding hydrophobic properties. What makes it stand out, is extremely easy application and wipe off, making it a real pleasure to use.

### BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Preparation is key! Make sure to wash and degrease the surface properly for maximum performance. Apply a light and uniform layer over dry paintwork. Leave it to cure for a minimum of 30 minutes before wipe-off. We recommend using Q²M PolishWipe for that task.  

GLOSS: ★★★★★
BEADING: ★★★★★
COLOR ENHANCEMENT: ★★★★★✰

All GYEON products does ***not ***contain any Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances (PFAS / 'forever chemicals') as defined or restricted under the relevant Canadian environmental and chemical management regulations, including but not limited to:

- The Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA) and its associated

- Prohibition of Certain Toxic Substances Regulations, 2012 (SOR/2012-285), as amended;

- The Domestic Substances List and Non-domestic Substances List under CEPA;
Any applicable federal or provincial restrictions pertaining to PFAS substances.

Can Q2 Wax be applied over ceramic coatings?

Yes, they're fully compatible, as long as you let the ceramic coating cure for at least a week before layering it with Q2 Wax.
It's recommended to quickly wax the front ends of your vehicle before a road trip (safe on PPF). This will make bugs come off that much quicker.

My Q2 Wax is 'cracked' and split, is it okay?

Yes it's fine, if this were filled in a regular tin can, it wouldn't crack as easily. Since it's in a tube that can be shifted up and down, this may cause the wax to crack, but it will not affect its application or performance whatsoever. It doesn't imply that the solvents are dry.

How long does it last?

It lasts up to 6 months. Be sure to maintain it with GYEON Quick Detailer to prolong its life and keep the water beading non-stop!

Can I apply it on windows?

You can, but it likely won't bond too well. We suggest not to; use Gyeon QuickView or Glass+ instead.

Anything else I need to know?

Check out the video [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tdm_f0bM-dg). It will likely answer the remainder of your questions!
